cards.subtitle: A WRITER, not an alphabet: describe what things mean and how they relate (is / part-of / before / with / could) and the system resolves it into a glyphgraph — form resolved from meaning, not picked. T
cards.name: Glyphgraph Generator — write a sentence by meaning

cards.subtitle: The conversational mark-foundry: describe a symbol, Vi proposes candidates (live-rendered as glyphics), give feedback, iterate, and Save into the icon library. Routes through CV_AI.execute(glyphic.gen
cards.name: Glyphic Foundry — AI symbol generation

cards.subtitle: A glyphic is a composition of independent parts under one unit: the outer RING, the FILL plane it bounds, and the SYMBOL on top. Each part owns its colour, texture and motion — cleanly separate — whil
cards.name: Per-part independence — ring · fill · symbol

cards.subtitle: A living spec: the icon system is really a multi-facet GLYPHIC — outer form (n-gon) + inner symbol + fill + colour + texture + motion + size + depth, each independent, each token-driven, each meaning-
cards.name: Glyphic System — the compositional model

cards.subtitle: Where everything lives: the real directory tree, every folder labelled with the system it holds, fully expandable. Click any folder or file to see what it is and its complete live contents — all token
cards.name: System Atlas — the directory map

cards.subtitle: The whole system on one screen — every folder, subfolder and file as nested boxes in their real directory structure, with the resolution lines that show how they wire together into a thing
cards.name: System Map

cards.subtitle: The vision walked in its own laws — the frame law, the one language, the three rooms that converged unprompted, the fusion map, the instrument as genesis-made-instant, the interface thesis, and the ho
cards.name: The Whole Thing, Seen Together

cards.subtitle: √(unit): every part is the same one unit; the system is the root of it. The radicand is the Glyphic anatomy — square element · inscribed ring · centre symbol. Three placements, one single-source mark
cards.name: Root Unity — the mark

cards.subtitle: Multi-surface frames, fluid type, the 'nothing teleports' motion language
cards.name: Foundations · Surfaces, Motion & Depth

cards.subtitle: The dimensional tokens — density spacing, the radius scale, the elevation/shadow ramp
cards.name: Spacing · Radius · Elevation

cards.name: Studio NG — powered by the One Inspector

cards.subtitle: The node Studio: a Make view for regular people and a Build view for system authors are the SAME projection at two audiences. Glyphic-native, zone-coloured, human copy, responsive. Voice is just anoth
cards.name: Studio — talk + click, one action layer

cards.subtitle: One projection-driven editor for the whole system: the SAME module edits a glyphic, a panel and a token — slots, the sockets half (finally visible), decorators and actions — read live from CV_PROJECT.
cards.name: The One Inspector

cards.subtitle: Every mark reads itself as a sentence — meaning composed from facet fields, via the meaning registry
cards.name: The Glyphic Language

templates.name: Capital Raise
templates.description: Investor capital-raise deck computed from the generative core — the running-sentence title chain (DESIGN-LANGUAGE §16) and the capital-raise grammar (orbital ring, stacked pipeline, spectrum, manifold

templates.name: Pitch Deck
templates.description: Investor/sales deck computed from the generative core — the narrative arc as content-as-data, recomputed live by the LOD / density / theme axis-dials.

tokens.name: --zone-base-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(3.5% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground-soft))

tokens.name: --zone-base-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(7%   * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground-soft))

tokens.name: --zone-base-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(16%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(3%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(7%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(15% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(5%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(10% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(18% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(6%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(12% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(22% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(5%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(10% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(20% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(6.5% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(12%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(22%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-success-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(6%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(12% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(22% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-warning) calc(7%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-gold) calc(9%  * var(--gold-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-gold) calc(18% * var(--gold-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-edge

tokens.name: --comm-strong

tokens.name: --comm-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-communication) calc(40% * var(--gold-intensity)),  var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --elev-1
tokens.value:
0 1px 2px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 8%,  transparent),
    0 1px 1px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 6%,  transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-2
tokens.value:
0 2px 6px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 10%, transparent),
    0 1px 2px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 8%,  transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-3
tokens.value:
0 8px 20px -6px  color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 16%, transparent),
    0 2px 6px  -2px  color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 10%, transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-4
tokens.value:
0 18px 40px -12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 22%, transparent),
    0 4px 10px -4px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 12%, transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-5
tokens.value:
0 32px 64px -20px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 28%, transparent),
    0 8px 18px -8px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 14%, transparent)

tokens.name: --glass-sheen
tokens.value:
linear-gradient(
      155deg,
      color-mix(in srgb, var(--glass-specular) 7%, transparent),
      transparent 44%)

tokens.name: --parchment-texture
tokens.value:
repeating-linear-gradient(93deg,  color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 7px),
    repeating-linear-gradient(177deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 2%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 11px)

tokens.name: --stone-texture
tokens.value:
radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent) 0 1.5px, transparent 2px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 70% 60%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1.5px),
    radial-gradient(circle at 45% 85%, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1.5px)

tokens.name: --velum-fill
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, color-mix(in oklch, var(--glass-ground) 55%, white) 72%, transparent)

tokens.name: --velum-fill-raised
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, color-mix(in oklch, var(--glass-ground) 48%, white) 84%, transparent)

tokens.name: --velum-fill-inset
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, color-mix(in oklch, var(--glass-ground) 65%, white) 58%, transparent)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 9px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value: repeating-linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 9px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 9px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value:
repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 10px),
  repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,  color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 3%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 10px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value:
linear-gradient(color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px),
  linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 4%, transparent) 0 1px, transparent 1px 4px)

tokens.name: --ground-texture-paint
tokens.value: radial-gradient(circle, color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 7%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1.5px)

tokens.name: --skin-ground
--skin-mat-sheen
tokens.value: linear-gradient(160deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--key-light, white) 26%, transparent), transparent 36%)

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture
tokens.value: var(--tex-role-card) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-face, 460px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture-inset
tokens.value: var(--tex-role-detail) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-detail, 420px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture-well
tokens.value: var(--tex-role-detail) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-detail, 420px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture-raised
tokens.value: var(--tex-role-trough) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-trough, 640px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-bevel
tokens.value:
inset 0 1.5px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--key-light) 72%, transparent),
    inset 0 -1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c-warm) 7%, transparent)

tokens.name: --depth-side
tokens.value:
0 1.5px 0 -0.5px color-mix(in oklch, var(--porcelain-fill) 91%, var(--shadow-c-warm)),
    0 3px 4px -3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c-warm) 17%, transparent)

tokens.name: --skin-mat-bevel
tokens.value:
inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, white 60%, transparent),
    inset 0 -1px 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c-warm) 10%, transparent)

tokens.name: --skin-mat-bevel
tokens.value:
inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in srgb, white 10%, transparent),
    inset 0 -1px 2px color-mix(in srgb, black 40%, transparent)

tokens.name: --skin-ground
--skin-mat-sheen
tokens.value: linear-gradient(178deg, color-mix(in srgb, white 30%, transparent), transparent 20%)

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture
tokens.value: var(--tex-linen-lit) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-face, 460px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture-well
tokens.value: var(--tex-paper-fine-lit) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-face, 460px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-ground
--skin-mat-sheen
tokens.value: linear-gradient(178deg, color-mix(in srgb, white 7%, transparent), transparent 24%)

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture
tokens.value: var(--tex-graphite-fine-lit) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-face, 460px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --skin-mat-texture-well
tokens.value: var(--tex-graphite-fine-lit) var(--mat-tex-pos, 0 0) / calc(var(--world-zoom, 1) * var(--span-face, 460px)) auto repeat

tokens.name: --device-metal
tokens.value:
linear-gradient(158deg,
                           color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 84%, #000),
                           color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 60%, #000))
